tiles.question: conservation/analysis-small-fleet
tiles.answer: Small fleet (V=10) violations show γ+H below prediction by 35-40%. This is the DECOUPLING regime — agents losing trust connections. At V=10, the predicted γ+H=0.917 but observed sum≈0.55. At V=50, one violation showed +50% above prediction — possible EMERGENCE event. The conservation law holds as an aggregate bound (99.95% compliance over 4.46M checks) but has systematic deviations at fleet size boundaries.
